overview: Pressure points are tied to Shani and Rahu and Ketu and need measured handling. Mixed stretches are shaped by Guru and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives will experience mixed results due to the influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, highly favorable outcomes are predicted; you will achieve your heart's desires regarding marriage and progeny, with your children bringing immense pride through their stellar career achievements and wisdom. Your business reputation will grow as your children lead ventures successfully, and you will enjoy a harmonious domestic life where your decisions are deeply respected.
opportunities: Until May 31, 2026, highly favorable outcomes are predicted; you will achieve your heart's desires regarding marriage and progeny, with your children bringing immense pride through their stellar career achievements and wisdom. Your business reputation will grow as your children lead ventures successfully, and you will enjoy a harmonious domestic life where your decisions are deeply respected.
caution: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives will face unfavorable results due to the influence of Saturn; specifically, the impact of the final phase of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) will lead to severe financial fluctuations, misfortune, and excessive, reckless spending. You may encounter eye-related health issues, while students will face increased pressure, and family responsibilities may feel overwhelming.

Your business reputation will grow as your children lead ventures successfully, and you will enjoy a harmonious domestic life where your decisions are deeply respected.

Your business reputation will grow as your children lead ventures successfully, and you will enjoy a harmonious domestic life where your decisions are deeply respected.
healthWellbeing: You may encounter eye-related health issues, while students will face increased pressure, and family responsibilities may feel overwhelming. During this period, you may face significant hurdles and mental distress within your marital or personal life.
blessing: Overall, during the Sri Parabhava year, Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives—especially those with Kala Sarpa Dosham in their personal birth charts—will face unfavorable results. To mitigate these adverse effects, it is highly recommended to frequently perform Purna Kumbha Shanti Japam for Jupiter (Guru), Saturn (Shani), Rahu, and Ketu throughout the year.

planetaryInfluences.summary: Throughout the Sri Parabhava year (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives will experience mixed results due to the influence of Jupiter. Until May 31, 2026, highly favorable outcomes are predicted; you will achieve your heart's desires regarding marriage and progeny, with your children bringing immense pride through their stellar career achievements and wisdom. Your business reputation will grow as your children lead ventures successfully, and you will enjoy a harmonious domestic life where your decisions are deeply respected.

Throughout the Sri Parabhava year, Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives will face unfavorable results due to the influence of Saturn; specifically, the impact of the final phase of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) will lead to severe financial fluctuations, misfortune, and excessive, reckless spending. You may encounter eye-related health issues, while students will face increased pressure, and family responsibilities may feel overwhelming. While those with a favorable Saturn in their personal birth charts may have opportunities to travel abroad, those with a weak Saturn might be forced to return to their homeland; therefore, individuals with insufficient planetary strength must remain extremely cautious in all matters this year. It is highly recommended to perform Tailabhishekam to Saturn on as many Saturdays as possible, exercise vigilance regarding black vehicles, iron objects, and mountain climbing, and conduct Shanti Japam at least once a month. Please note that the Elinati Shani period for Kumbha Rasi will finally conclude in July 2027. Additionally, you should frequently donate 100 grams of black sesame seeds in water and daily recite the Shani Mantra:

For Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives, the influence of Rahu during the Sri Parabhava year will be moderately favorable from the start of the year until December 5, 2026. However, from December 6, 2026, until the conclusion of the year, you will face severe adverse results. Be cautious, as behaving without compassion or kindness may distance good people from you, potentially leading to associations with wicked individuals; these negative connections could force you into a cycle of taking loans to meet excessive expenditures. It is essential to be extremely selective with new friendships and to undergo regular health check-ups, particularly regarding heart health. Understand that any wealth lost during this period is unlikely to be recovered, so you must recognize the true value of money before spending.

For Kumbha Rasi (Aquarius) natives, the influence of Ketu will bring unfavorable results during the Sri Parabhava year until December 4, 2026. During this period, you may face significant hurdles and mental distress within your marital or personal life. It is also advised to remain cautious, as associations with negative or ill-intentioned women could lead to unforeseen difficulties. However, a positive shift occurs from December 5, 2026, until the end of the year, bringing a degree of relief and favorable outcomes. You will finally discover the right paths and solutions to extricate yourself from persistent financial problems and stabilize your situation.

monthlyHighlights.summary: In this month, your financial income will remain average, but your home will be filled with joyful events and the support of friends and relatives. While success in your planned activities may not come as quickly as expected, and your professional workload increases significantly, you will possess the necessary endurance to handle the pressure. It is advisable to curb the tendency to interfere in every matter and avoid the mindset that you know everything, as this will help maintain harmony. From the 20th of the month, you will receive full cooperation from your spouse, and those seeking progeny will find success with the help of medical assistance. While efforts for new employment will succeed only after significant struggle, the 9th and 16th of this month are particularly favorable for new initiatives. Be cautious of extreme emotional swings, as being overwhelmed by either anger or joy could lead to stress-related issues like headaches; listening to your inner conscience will be your best guide.

In this month, favorable planetary positions will bring a degree of positive results. Those born under the Purvabhadra constellation will see success in their planned activities, and financial income will show a slight increase. However, scheduled travels may be postponed or canceled, and you must exercise extreme caution while driving vehicles, as there is a risk of accidents. While employees will experience average results, the unemployed may find job opportunities that are slightly below their expected level. For those born under the Shatabhisha constellation, health issues will begin to subside. During the third week, you will be able to complete long-pending tasks and resolve disputes directly by engaging in straightforward communication with your rivals. Young people will find themselves drawn toward politics, and business operations will proceed smoothly, leading to a gradual improvement in your overall financial condition.

The favorable results from the previous month will continue into this month as well. You will establish acquaintances with prominent individuals, and luck will be on your side regarding real estate transactions. You will be able to understand the perspectives of others and complete your tasks effectively. However, it is essential to refrain from using harsh or offensive language in your conversations, as there is a tendency to speak impulsively. Employees will receive due recognition for their hard work, and politicians will see a rise in their public popularity. Between the 15th and 21st of this month, you will face heavy work pressure and a busy schedule, requiring you to demonstrate skills beyond your usual capacity to complete important tasks. Be cautious in financial matters on the 5th and 8th, as situations may arise where you have to spend significantly on your friends.

In this month, your financial income will remain average, and it is advisable not to initiate new ventures by blindly trusting the words of others. You may face misunderstandings and potential conflicts with siblings within the family. During this period, you might find it difficult to arrive at the right decisions yourself, yet remain reluctant to listen to the advice of others. Business activities will proceed slowly, and you should avoid trying to exert undue authority over family members. For those born under the Dhanishta constellation, efforts toward progeny will be successful. However, in the final week, a tendency for both partners to act with overly independent mindsets may reduce the harmony between husband and wife, leading to missed opportunities for joyful moments with your spouse. It is best to postpone important decisions on the 15th, 16th, and 17th of this month.

This month will be successful for those seeking new employment, job changes, or a change in residence. However, you may face obstacles in matters related to foreign countries. The period before the 14th is favorable for starting new business ventures, and your efforts to find new sources of income will yield positive results. Your ideas will begin to take a practical shape, and you will receive the expected support and cooperation from relatives and friends. You will find yourself adapting your mindset effectively to suit changing circumstances. Due to the favorable influence of Mars (Kuja), there are strong possibilities for attaining new positions or promotions. However, during the third and fourth weeks, conflicts may arise with those working under you, which could lead to certain difficulties and losses. On the health front, there is a possibility of issues related to kidney or bladder stones, so extra care is advised.

During this month, even though your responsibilities increase and you may face some financial challenges, you will be able to fulfill all your obligations without any major setbacks. Those born under the Shatabhisha constellation will have the fortunate opportunity to meet spiritual leaders or scholars. While your financial income will remain average, minor issues may arise with your maternal relatives. During the first and second weeks, you might inadvertently create some new complications for yourself; however, from the third week onwards, you will successfully fulfill long-held desires. You will provide the necessary comforts and facilities for your children, and the month ends with the satisfaction of enjoying wholesome and hearty meals. Additionally, the period between the 2nd and 8th of this month is highly favorable for efforts related to purchasing or developing your own land or house.

In this month, changes in your professional and business affairs will prove to be auspicious and beneficial. Your financial income will show an upward trend, enabling you to overcome all obstacles and complete tasks that have been long postponed. You are likely to purchase new items or appliances for your home. While those in the marketing sector will face increased physical exertion, employees will successfully stand their ground and secure their rightful dues. The business environment remains encouraging; however, during the third week, your expenditures may exceed your income. The final week, specifically from the 22nd until the end of the month, brings highly favorable planetary support. Government employees may be bestowed with new authorities or promotions, and those in religious or spiritual professions will be able to earn significantly well during this period..

In this month, issues in your marital life will begin to subside, and efforts for the marriage of the unmarried will finally bear fruit. While your financial income remains average, you will experience significant happiness and satisfaction in your personal life. Obstacles that have been hindering your plans to move abroad or pursue opportunities in foreign lands will be cleared, leading to successful international travel arrangements. Business operations will proceed smoothly; however, you may find yourself having to pay substantial amounts to the government in the form of taxes or fees. Your long-held desire to purchase a new vehicle is likely to be fulfilled this month. Furthermore, your affection for your children will deepen, and they, in turn, will develop greater respect and regard for their parents.

In this month, all your initiated tasks will be completed, though with some delays. You will receive well-deserved respect and recognition in society. This is an excellent time to introduce new trends in your business and undertake expansion activities. Those in the field of handicrafts will find this month particularly rewarding. In your professional life, you will be assigned new projects that bring a sense of job satisfaction and stability. However, be cautious between the 13th and 17th of this month, as there are indications of potential health issues. During the final week, increased suspicions regarding your colleagues may lead to mental anxiety. It is essential to be careful during conversations; your naturally serious or loud tone of voice might be misunderstood, leading to unnecessary complications.

This month is not very favorable and indicates potential setbacks in your professional life. You may face adverse conditions in your current job or profession, and business owners may find that their income falls short of expectations. Impulsive behavior and lack of self-control could lead to irritations and subsequent legal or court-related disputes. Amidst these challenging circumstances, you may also face problems from enemies. This month is not suitable for initiating new ventures. Furthermore, your reputation within the family may decline due to your own mistakes. Visiting Sri Vaishnava temples during this month will help you find much-needed mental peace. Please note that the 6th, 8th, 10th, 19th, and 26th are unfavorable dates.

In this month, elderly individuals may need to undergo eye-related surgeries. Legal and court matters will turn in your favor, and your financial income remains steady as unnecessary expenditures decrease. Small-scale speculation or investments may yield modest profits during this period. Misunderstandings with your spouse will be resolved, and you will enjoy their renewed affection and love. Students aspiring to study at foreign universities will see their dreams fulfilled as their efforts bear fruit. While business activities will provide average results, your reputation and respect at your workplace will increase. However, this month is not particularly favorable for those planning for progeny or children.

In this month, you will find a smooth flow in your ongoing tasks, which will provide much-needed relief from recent mental stress. In your professional life, you are likely to secure new long-term contracts or agreements. Although new ventures may face some initial hurdles, they will conclude successfully by the end of the month. Around mid-month, there are strong possibilities for celebrating auspicious events related to a female child in the family. Efforts by the unemployed to secure jobs will finally be successful, and politicians will attain the recognition or positions they have been aspiring for. Throughout this month, your financial income will remain steady and average.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
